title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Voltas Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Voltas Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Voltas Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Voltas Digital Technologies:
Voltas Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
